text:
……アークスも基本はチョコなんだね。
どれもユニークな発想だとは思うけど
まったく参考にならなかった。

はーっ……
薄々思ってたけど、あんたたちって
１００％変わり者ばっかよね。

……私が言うのもなんだけど
クゥには言われたくないと思う。

うっさいよ、フル。
女性の意見だけだと不公平だから
今度は男性の意見も聞

So ARKS is also essentially in the chocolate
camp. There were some unique ideas
in there, but nothing very useful as
reference material.

*sigh* You know, this confirms a thought I've
had for a while: you people are 100% weirdos.

You're the LAST person who should be
throwing stones, Ochy.

Shut up, Phul. Anyway, surveying only
women just gives us one side of the story, so I
want some opinions from men next time!
